# Automyze — Premium AI Operations Consulting

> Source: [https://www.automyze.in](https://www.automyze.in)  
> Last updated: 2026-06-28

## About
Automyze is a premium AI Operations Consulting and Business Transformation firm based in Mumbai, India. We help growing businesses eliminate repetitive work, reduce manual processes, lower team workload, and build long-term operational efficiency. We partner with business owners and leaders to engineer practical, scalable AI workflows that deliver concrete commercial outcomes.

## Core Methodology
- AI Operational Audit: Deep workflow discovery mapping manual friction points and bottlenecks.
- AI Strategy Roadmap: Full architecture designs and ROI projections for custom AI systems.
- System Implementation: Seamless deployment of custom LLM, RAG, and agent infrastructure into existing CRMs.
- AI Team Enablement: Workforce training, detailed documentation, and post-launch optimization.

## Specializations (Process Automation)
- Lead Management: Capture, qualify, and route inbound prospects in under 60 seconds.
- WhatsApp Business Operations: Transition conversational channels from support clutter to auto-pre-sales engines.
- Customer Support: Inbound/outbound triage, 24/7 automated resolution, and smart escalation routing.
- Document Processing: Intelligent OCR and LLM extraction from invoices, statements, and shipping bills.
- Appointment Booking: Custom voice and chat booking agents syncing with calendars.
- Quotation Generation: Instant pricing engines to reduce time-to-quote.
- Back Office Operations: Auto invoice reconciliation and ERP/accounting sync.
- Team Productivity: Custom AI work environments and internal SOP knowledge bases.

## Target Sectors
Serving logistics, real estate, clinics, solar installers, manufacturing, automobiles (dealerships & spare parts distribution), and local service businesses across India and globally.

## Engagement Model
- Typical project timelines: 2 to 4 weeks depending on workflow complexity.
- Discovery: Free 30-minute AI Operational Audit consultation via our on-site request form.
